tools.name: agent.setup.claude_code
tools.description: Generate a Claude Code MCP config for local AgentPDF tools.

tools.name: pdf.inspect.document
tools.description: Detect page count, page sizes, rotations, encryption, metadata, text layer, forms, annotations, attachments, signatures, scanned pages, outlines.

tools.name: pdf.inspect.pages
tools.description: Return per-page dimensions, rotation, text availability, image count, object count, and renderability.

tools.name: pdf.workflow.plan
tools.description: Plan a local-first agent PDF workflow.

tools.name: pdf.workflow.run
tools.description: Execute a local-first agent PDF workflow manifest and return per-step evidence.

tools.name: pdf.workflow.report
tools.description: Summarize workflow artifacts, warnings, validation, and step evidence.

tools.name: pdf.context.build_packet
tools.description: Build a local Context Packet with source graph metadata.

tools.name: pdf.compose.from_context
tools.description: Compose a validated target PDF from a Context Packet and target profile.

tools.name: pdf.target.profiles
tools.description: List built-in target PDF profiles with layout slots and accepted block types.

tools.name: pdf.target.validate_profile
tools.description: Validate a built-in or custom target PDF profile for agent composition.

tools.name: pdf.evidence.coverage_report
tools.description: Create an evidence coverage report from a composition artifact.

tools.name: pdf.artifacts.export_bundle
tools.description: Export local PDFs, manifests, source maps, validation reports, and patch evidence as a portable audit bundle.

tools.name: pdf.artifacts.verify_bundle
tools.description: Verify a portable audit bundle manifest, ZIP entries, and SHA-256 checksums before downstream agent use.

tools.name: pdf.patch.plan
tools.description: Create a structured append-only patch manifest for Markdown, code, table, image, slide, source-map, and template-layer evidence.

tools.name: pdf.patch.preview
tools.description: Preview patch effects and validation requirements.

tools.name: pdf.patch.apply
tools.description: Apply a patch transaction and write a new PDF artifact.

tools.name: pdf.patch.verify
tools.description: Verify a patched PDF against a patch manifest.

tools.name: pdf.inspect.health
tools.description: Detect corruption, missing xref, malformed objects, huge pages, suspicious attachments, embedded JavaScript.

tools.name: pdf.organize.split
tools.description: Split PDF by page ranges, every N pages, bookmarks, single pages, or file-size target.

tools.name: pdf.organize.extract_pages
tools.description: Extract specific pages into a new PDF.

tools.name: pdf.organize.n_up
tools.description: Place multiple source pages on one output page.

tools.name: pdf.organize.flatten_pages
tools.description: Flatten annotations and forms into page content.

tools.name: pdf.optimize.repair
tools.description: Repair malformed PDF structures where possible.

tools.name: pdf.convert.markdown_to_pdf
tools.description: Render Markdown to PDF with deterministic local style packs.

tools.name: pdf.convert.url_to_pdf
tools.description: Render URL to PDF with SSRF-safe fetch.

tools.name: pdf.convert.pdf_to_json
tools.description: Convert PDF to Document IR JSON.

tools.name: pdf.edit.strikeout
tools.description: Strike out text spans or coordinates.

tools.name: pdf.security.sanitize
tools.description: Remove JavaScript, attachments, external actions, and metadata.

tools.name: pdf.ai.parse.lite
tools.description: Local text-layer and heuristic layout parser.

tools.name: pdf.ai.rag.chat
tools.description: Ask a local PDF and return answer, citations, report PDF, and highlighted source PDF.

tools.name: pdf.ai.rag.highlight_sources
tools.description: Produce highlighted source PDF from local RAG citations.

tools.name: pdf.ai.rag.export_report
tools.description: Create a cited Q&A/source PDF report from a local RAG index.

tools.name: pdf.ai.create.from_prompt
tools.description: Create a validated local PDF from a prompt, template, and optional JSON data.

tools.name: pdf.ai.create.template_preview
tools.description: Generate and validate a local preview PDF for a creation template.

tools.name: pdf.ai.create.templates
tools.description: List local PDF creation templates, style packs, and color keys.

tools.name: pdf.ai.create.template_packs
tools.description: List local template packs for agent-created PDFs.

tools.name: pdf.ai.create.validate_template_pack
tools.description: Validate a local template pack contract.

tools.name: pdf.ai.create.plan_template_pack
tools.description: Plan a local template-pack PDF creation call from target and context evidence.

tools.name: pdf.ai.create.agent
tools.description: Run the local create agent: plan, create, render-check, blank-check, and coverage.

tools.name: pdf.ai.create.from_template_pack
tools.description: Create a validated local PDF from a template pack with source and slot routing evidence.
